title: evolve configuration
description: Optional .evolve.<ext> configuration for an evolve repository (yaml, yml, json, or jsonc at the root; at most one). Generated from the viper config by `evolve docs --format config`; do not edit by hand.

$schema.description: Optional URI of this schema; ignored by evolve, honored by editors.

layout.description: Repository layout: auto, marketplace, multi, or single.

default_models.description: Model spec used when --models is omitted: provider names, model ids, provider-qualified ids (cursor/sonnet-4.5), or all.

results_format.description: Format for committed results files and the EVALUATION rollup: json, jsonc, or yaml.

license.description: License every SKILL.md must declare; when unset, skills must not declare one.

description_pattern.description: Regex every skill description must match.

forbid_hooks.description: Forbid a hooks/ directory in plugins.

triggers_min_pass_rate.description: Minimum triggers pass rate (0-1); report --check exits 1 below it.

evals_min_pass_rate.description: Minimum evals pass rate (0-1); report --check exits 1 below it.

models.description: Model keys (provider/model-id) the thresholds apply to.

providers.description: Per-provider overrides: providers.<name>.models replaces that provider's builtin model matrix (model ids, display names, USD-per-mtok pricing).

models.description: Replacement model matrix for this provider.

model.description: One model in a provider's matrix.

id.description: Model id passed to the runner CLI (required).

display.description: Human-readable name shown in reports (default: the id).

input_per_mtok.description: Input price in USD per million tokens (omit when unpublished).

output_per_mtok.description: Output price in USD per million tokens (omit when unpublished).
